_meta.note: Static demo dataset for the customer app. Keys map to API responses: categories -> GET /categories, reservationTypes -> GET /reservation-types & /reservation-types/{slug}, slots -> GET /slots?reservation_type={slug}, membership -> GET /me/membership, user -> auth/me, reservations -> GET /reservations & /reservations/{uuid}.

categories.label: Stays
categories.headline: Somewhere worth waking up
categories.blurb: Suites, villas and hideaways — booked in a breath.

categories.label: Dining
categories.headline: The table is set
categories.blurb: Tasting menus, corner tables and late-night counters.

categories.label: Salon & Spa
categories.headline: In good hands
categories.blurb: Cuts, colour, thermal circuits and quiet hours.

categories.label: Clinics
categories.headline: Seen, on time
categories.blurb: Consultations and treatments with the specialists you want.

categories.label: Workspaces
categories.headline: Room to think
categories.blurb: Hot desks, studios and meeting rooms by the hour or day.

reservationTypes.name: Deluxe King Suite
reservationTypes.description: A corner suite with a king bed, soaking tub and floor-to-ceiling harbour views.
reservationTypes.about: The Deluxe King Suite sits on the upper floors of Aurora House, wrapped in glass on two sides. A king bed dressed in linen, a deep soaking tub by the window, a walk-in rain shower, and a lounge corner made for slow mornings. Turndown at eight, coffee whenever you ring.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Aurora House · Harbour district
terms: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival
Check-in from 3:00 PM, checkout by 11:00 AM

reviews.body: The view at sunrise is unreal. Bed like a cloud, and the tub by the window sold me for life.
Impeccable service, late checkout was no problem at all. Will book the same suite again.
Quiet, spotless, and the coffee actually good. The little things are handled here.

reservationTypes.name: Cliffside Villa
reservationTypes.description: A private two-bedroom villa on the cliff edge with a heated infinity pool.
reservationTypes.about: Perched where the land meets the sea, the Cliffside Villa is yours alone — two bedrooms, an open kitchen, and a heated infinity pool that spills toward the horizon. A private chef can be arranged; the sunsets come free.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Aurora House · Cape reserve
terms: Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival

reviews.body: Woke to nothing but sea and sky. The pool at night is pure magic.

reservationTypes.name: Nord
reservationTypes.description: A seven-course tasting menu at the chef's counter.
reservationTypes.about: Nord is sixteen seats around an open kitchen. One menu each night — seven courses drawn from the coast and the season, poured with a matching flight if you like. Dinner takes about two and a half hours; give it the evening.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Nord · Old Town
terms: Menu changes nightly with the market

reviews.body: Every plate told a little story. The counter seat is the whole point — watch it happen.
Beautiful food, generous pours. Bring an appetite and no rush.

reservationTypes.name: Dr Amara Reyes
reservationTypes.description: General consultation with an integrative physician.
reservationTypes.about: Dr Amara Reyes takes an unhurried, whole-picture approach — forty-five minutes to actually talk, examine and plan. New patients welcome; bring any recent results and a list of what's on your mind.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Lumière Care · Wellness wing
terms: Cancel up to 24 hours before at no charge
Bring recent test results if available

reviews.body: She listened — properly. Left with an actual plan for the first time.

reservationTypes.name: Maison Coif
reservationTypes.description: Cut and finish with a senior stylist.
reservationTypes.about: A calm room, a good chair, and a stylist who remembers how you like it. Consultation, cut, and a proper blow-dry — colour if you're feeling it. Herbal tea while you settle in.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Maison Coif · Rue Blanc
terms: Cancel up to 12 hours before at no charge
Colour services take longer — allow extra time

reviews.body: Best cut I've had in years. They actually listened to 'just a trim'.

reservationTypes.name: Thermal Spa Circuit
reservationTypes.about: Sauna, steam, cold plunge, and a warm relaxation room — flow through the circuit at your own pace over two hours. Robes, slippers and tea provided. Leave your phone in the locker.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Lumière Care · Thermal wing
terms: Cancel up to 24 hours before for a full refund

reviews.body: Melted a whole week of stress. The cold plunge is worth the courage.

reservationTypes.name: Hot Desk Day Pass
reservationTypes.description: A full day at a shared desk with everything you need.
reservationTypes.about: Drop in, plug in, get it done. A full day at a shared desk with fast Wi-Fi, bottomless coffee, phone booths for calls, and a quiet floor when you need it. Doors from 8 AM to 8 PM.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Nomad Spaces · Central
terms: Prepaid, non-refundable within 12 hours of start

reviews.body: Reliable Wi-Fi and good coffee. Booths are a lifesaver for calls.

reservationTypes.name: Meeting Room
reservationTypes.description: A six-seat meeting room by the hour.
reservationTypes.about: A bright meeting room for six, with a large screen, whiteboard wall and a door that actually closes. Book by the hour; coffee and water are on the house.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Nomad Spaces · Central
terms: Cancel up to 2 hours before for a refund

reservationTypes.name: Aurora Symphonic
reservationTypes.description: An evening with the Aurora Symphonic Orchestra.
reservationTypes.about: The Aurora Symphonic returns to the Grand Hall for one night — a programme of romantic favourites and a new commission, under the resident conductor. Doors at 7, curtain at 7:30. Dress: whatever makes you feel wonderful.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Grand Hall · Arts quarter
terms: Latecomers seated at a suitable break

reviews.body: Goosebumps from the first bar. The new piece was a revelation.

reservationTypes.name: Sora
reservationTypes.description: Rooftop small plates and cocktails under the sky.
reservationTypes.about: Sora sits on the 30th floor — a wraparound terrace, a long marble bar, and a menu of small plates built for sharing. Come for the sunset hour; stay for the skyline.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Sora · Rooftop, Aurora House

reviews.body: The view alone is worth it — the burrata sealed the deal.

reservationTypes.name: The Larder
reservationTypes.description: All-day brunch and a very good coffee.
reservationTypes.about: A sunny corner room that does brunch from open to close — eggs any way, fresh pastries, and a filter coffee worth crossing town for. Walk-ins welcome, but a table's nicer.
reservationTypes.subtitle: The Larder · Old Town
terms: Hold up to 15 minutes past booking
Cancel any time before your slot

reviews.body: Best flat white in the district and the ricotta hotcakes are unreal.

reservationTypes.name: Kettle & Co
reservationTypes.about: Ten stools, a steaming pass, and a bowl of ramen that takes two days to make. Order at the counter, slurp, and make room for the next. No reservations for more than four.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Kettle & Co · Night market

reviews.body: Worth the queue. The tonkotsu is the real thing.

reservationTypes.name: Vero
reservationTypes.description: A neighbourhood trattoria with handmade pasta.
reservationTypes.about: Vero is the trattoria you wish was on your corner — pasta rolled that morning, a short list of natural wines, and a room that hums by eight. Bring people you like.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Vero · Riverside
terms: $20 hold per seat, credited to your bill

reviews.body: Tasted like Sunday at nonna's. The cacio e pepe, order it.

reservationTypes.name: Garden Loft
reservationTypes.description: A plant-filled loft with a private terrace.
reservationTypes.about: Tucked above a courtyard, the Garden Loft is all greenery and light — a queen bed, a little kitchen, and a private terrace strung with lights. Slow coffee, slower mornings.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Aurora House · Courtyard
terms: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before

reviews.body: The terrace at night, string lights and plants everywhere. Didn't want to leave.

reservationTypes.name: Midnight Cinema
reservationTypes.description: A late-night screening under the stars.
reservationTypes.about: A rooftop screen, deck chairs, blankets, and a cult classic that starts when the city goes quiet. Popcorn included; bring someone to share the blanket.
reservationTypes.subtitle: Grand Hall · Rooftop

reviews.body: Blade Runner on a rooftop at midnight. Doesn't get better.

vouchers.label: 3 nights, 1 free
vouchers.description: Stay 3 nights, the 3rd is on us
